evidence: Kubelet certificate validity failure shows current node time is outside the certificate validity window
Pod is assigned to node node1
Timeline contains kubelet or node-controller event indicating certificate is not yet valid due to node time skew

causes.message: Node clock is out of sync with control-plane certificate validity
Node clock skew breaks kubelet certificate validation and API communication
Kubelet cannot reliably update node status while node time is invalid

node:node1: Ready condition=False reason=KubeletNotReady with time-validity failure
pod:time-skew-affected-pod: Pod is affected because kubelet certificate validation is failing due to node clock skew

likely_causes: NTP or chrony is not synchronizing node time
Node clock drift makes kubelet certificates appear not yet valid
Virtual machine host time drift propagated to the node
Time synchronization service is stopped or misconfigured
suggested_checks: Inspect kubelet logs for certificate not-yet-valid errors
